_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 4 banned-recalled `status` tiers (banned, recalled, high_risk, watchlist). Drives the B0 verdict gate in scoring (banned/recalled => BLOCKED) and the ban-context display in Flutter alerts. UI-bound vocab — carries full DISPLAY CONTRACT.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for banned-status presentation. Each entry carries name + short_label + tone + ui_color + ui_icon + action — Flutter renders verbatim.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/banned_recalled_ingredients.json `status` field (146 entries; live: banned=93, high_risk=29, recalled=13, watchlist=11).

field_contract.name: Full user-facing label.
field_contract.tone: Semantic intent: positive | neutral | info | warning | danger.
field_contract.ui_color: Color hint: green | blue | gray | yellow | orange | red.
field_contract.ui_icon: Icon hint: check | info | warning | alert | block.
field_contract.regulatory_basis: Plain-text description of the regulatory basis for this status.

banned_statuses.name: Banned substance
banned_statuses.notes: Substance is prohibited in dietary supplements by FDA, DEA, or international authorities. Triggers BLOCKED verdict in scoring.
banned_statuses.regulatory_basis: FDA adulterant determination, DEA scheduling, or WADA prohibition list.

banned_statuses.name: Recalled product
banned_statuses.notes: Product was recalled by manufacturer or by FDA/regulator due to a safety concern. Triggers BLOCKED verdict in scoring.
banned_statuses.regulatory_basis: FDA Class I/II/III recall, manufacturer voluntary withdrawal.

banned_statuses.name: High-risk substance
banned_statuses.notes: Substance is legal but carries significant safety concerns documented in clinical literature or adverse-event reports. Use only with provider oversight.
banned_statuses.regulatory_basis: Clinical case reports, FAERS adverse events, NCCIH safety advisories.

banned_statuses.name: Watchlist substance
banned_statuses.notes: Substance is under regulatory monitoring or has emerging safety signals. Not yet banned but warrants caution and informed-consent discussion.
banned_statuses.regulatory_basis: FDA monitoring, EFSA risk assessment in progress, NTP listing.
